options.content:
**Bespoke TrueNAS SCALE 25.10 "Goldeye" dashboard** — visualises the metrics this box *actually* emits (the upstream `truenas-graphite-to-prometheus` dashboards target vanilla netdata chart names 25.10 does not produce, so they render blank).

**Data sources:** `truenas-graphite-exporter` (:9108, ZFS ARC / disks / NFS / NIC / system), `smartctl-exporter` (:9633, disk temps + SMART health), `node-exporter` (:9100, pool/dataset capacity on `/mnt/pool*`). ARC series come from the `zfs_arc_*` recording rules (PR #3102).

**Gotchas baked in:** bridge values are already per-second rates → no `rate()`; disks key by `_serial_*`; **no pool-state/scrub metric exists** (pool health stays on TrueNAS-native alerting + the SMART table). Container legends are cgroup hashes (see the upstream *cgroups* dashboard for friendly names).

panels.title: SMART unhealthy drives
panels.description: Drives whose SMART overall-health self-assessment is FAILING.

panels.title: Throughput per disk (read +, write −)
panels.description: netdata gauge already in KiB/s; ×1024 → bytes/s. Writes drawn negative.

panels.title: Reallocated sectors
panels.description: ATA SMART raw Reallocated_Sector_Ct — any value > 0 is a wear signal.

panels.title: Pool free space trend
panels.description: Watch the slope of Free for fill-rate / capacity planning.

panels.title: NFSv3 ops/s by op
panels.description: Collapse if NFSv3 is unused on this box.

panels.title: Throughput rx / tx (rx +, tx −)
panels.description: netdata gauge in kbit/s; ×1000 → bit/s. tx drawn negative.

panels.title: Packets / drops
panels.description: Any non-zero drop rate is alert-worthy.

panels.title: bond0 link state
panels.description: state=up dimension of netdata's operstate chart (1 = link up).

panels.title: bond0 aggregate speed
panels.description: Sum of both 100G LACP members — expect 200 Gbit when both are up (bond0 itself emits no interface_speed).

panels.title: CPU temperature
panels.description: Per-core cpu label is mangled (cpucpu…); aggregates are the useful series.

panels.title: Memory used %
panels.description: Mangled double-prefix meminfo names are real (see spec §4).

panels.title: Container CPU (cgroups)
panels.description: Legend is a cgroup hash (no friendly name from the bridge) — use the upstream cgroups dashboard for names.
